name: Pop It game console (pink/white)
shortDescription:
A fun and attractive game for training memory by repeating the patterns of pressing Pop It buttons. Through the Pop It electronic game console, the child trains:
– cognitive and motor skills,
– memory and brain,
– concentration and focus,
– quick reaction and reflexes,
– eye and hand coordination,
– logical thinking,
– creative thinking,
– ability to solve problems,
and all this through fun and games.

Great toy for kids. The game creates an opportunity for the entire family to have fun spending their free time and strengthen family ties. It encourages spending free time without the use of smart devices and without an Internet connection.

Technical characteristics – 4x game modes:
– Challenges: 200x levels of gameplay, each level consisting of 5x sub-levels: increasing difficulty by lighting the number of Pop It balls and decreasing the available time.
– Memory: 9x levels of gameplay, each level consisting of 5x sub-levels: repeating pressing of illuminated Pop It circles.
– Collecting points: timed game duration and pressing Pop It circles.
– Multiplayer: take turns playing multiplayer and compete by pressing Pop It circles.
Adjust the volume.

Runs on 3x AAA batteries (not included).

Suitable for children +2 years.

Dimension: size: 155*76*53 mm, weight: 135 g.

Warranty: 12 months.

Additional: product box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Note: Presentation materials are symbolic.
shortDescription_sl:
Zabavna in atraktivna igra za treniranje spomina s ponavljanjem vzorcev pritiskanja Pop It gumbov. Skozi elektronsko igralno konzolo Pop It otrok trenira:
– kognitivne in motorične sposobnosti,
– spomin in možgane,
– koncentracijo in fokus,
– hitrostno reagiranje in reflekse,
– koordinacijo oči in rok,
– logično razmišljanje,
– kreativno razmišljanje,
– sposobnost reševanja težav,
in vse to preko zabave in igre.

Odlična igrača za otroke. Igra ustvarja priložnost za zabavno preživljanje prostega časa celotne družine in krepitev družinskih vezi. Spodbuja preživljanje prostega časa brez uporabe pametnih naprav in brez povezave z internetom.

Tehnične značilnosti – 4x načini igre:
– Izzivi: 200x stopenj igranja, od katerih je vsaka stopnja sestavljena iz 5x pod-stopenj: višanje težavnosti s prižiganjem števila Pop It krogcev in zmanjševanjem razpoložljivega časa.
– Spomin: 9x stopenj igranja, od katerih je vsaka stopnja sestavljena iz 5x pod-stopenj: ponavljanje pritiska osvetljenih Pop It krogcev.
– Zbiranje točk: časovno omejeno trajanje igre in pritiskanje Pop It krogcev.
– Več igralcev: izmenično igranje več igralcev in tekmovanje s pritiskanjem Pop It krogcev.
Nastavitev glasnosti.

Deluje na 3x AAA baterije (niso priložene).

Primerno za otroke +2 leti.

Dodatno: škatla izdelka, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Garancija: 12 mesecev.

Dimenzije: velikost: 155*76*53 mm, teža: 135,7 g.

Opomba: predstavitveni materiali so simbolični.

name: Magnetic board for creation (black)
shortDescription:
A light, fun and educational creative magnetic board for drawing by stringing magnetic balls and a magnetic pen. The surface of the board consists of a 19×20 grid, which allows you to create with 380 pieces of magnetic balls that you string into artwork through drawing. The magnetic board encourages the child’s motor skills and drawing techniques, encourages the development of talents and creativity. Calm and quiet game, to be played at home or anywhere on the go.

Use: Use your finger or the edge of a pen to push the magnetic balls inside the board to erase the artwork and start over. The magnetic balls are made of stainless steel and do not fall out of the inside of the magnetic board. You can create any images you want with the magnetic pen.

Safe, non-toxic, lead-free materials are used in the production of the board.

Suitable for children +2 years.

Size: 177*218*12 mm, weight: 40 dag, mesh size 19*20 (380 magnetic balls).

Warranty: 6 months.

Additional: product box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Note: Presentation materials are symbolic.
shortDescription_sl:
Lahka, zabavna in poučna ustvarjalna magnetna tabla za risanje z nizanjem magnetnih kroglic in z magnetnim pisalom. Površina table je sestavljena iz mreže 19×20, kar omogoča ustvarjanje s 380 koščki magnetnih kroglic, ki jih skozi risanje nizaš v umetnino. Magnetna tabla spodbuja otrokove motorične sposobnosti in tehnike risanja, spodbuja razvoj talentov in kreativnosti. Umirjena in tiha igra, za igranje doma ali kjerkoli na poti.

Uporaba: S prstom ali robom pisala potisnete magnetne kroglice v notranjost table, da umetnino izbrišete in začnete znova. Magnetne kroglice so iz nerjavečega jekla in ne padejo ven iz notranjosti magnetne table. Z magnetnim pisalom lahko ustvarjate poljubne slike.

Pri izdelavi table so uporabljeni varni, nestrupeni materiali, brez svinca.

Primerno za otroke +2 leti.

Velikost: 177*218*12 mm, teža: 40 dag, velikost mreže 19*20 (380 magnetnih kroglic).

Dodatno: škatla izdelka, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Ganacija: 6 mesecev.

Opomba: predstavitveni materiali so simbolični.

name: Multifunctional car for the youngest (pink-purple/green-blue)
shortDescription:
Educational and fun multifunctional toy for the youngest in the form of a timeless sports car. The size and weight of the toy is adapted to the use of the youngest, and the functionality of the multifunctional car impresses both younger and older children. Safe and durable. 2-level volume setting. The car has 4 wheels that allow you to drive by hand, the spoiler of the car also includes a soft removable safe silicone rubber as a teether so that you can wash it at high temperatures, and on the chassis of the car, children will find 13 more function keys for the first mastering of the skills of the youngest. starry sky with time delay.

Functionalities: hand-eye coordination, learning English, silicone teether, soothing sleep.

Technical capabilities: 12 buttons, 2 modes, 13 functions (3x nursery rhymes, 15x piano music, 15x lullabies for peaceful sleep, naming 6x family members (grandpa, grandma, grandfather, grandmother, father, mother), naming 6x vehicles (car, CRH, train, plane, motorcycle, bicycle), naming 6x animals (cat, dog, bear, rabbit, tiger, sheep), naming 7x colors (red, yellow, green, blue, white, light blue, purple), 5x sounds SMS messages, 4x weather sounds (thunder, lighting, windy, rain), 5x phone usage/ringing sounds, 2x photography sounds, 5x children’s sounds).

Runs on 3x AAA batteries (not included).

Suitable for children +18 months.

Additional: product box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Note: Materials are symbolic.
shortDescription_sl:
Izobraževalna in zabavna multifunkcijska igrača za najmlajše v obliki brezčasnega športnega avtomobilčka. Velikost in teža igrače je prilagojena uporabi najmlajših, funkcionalnosti multifunkcijskega avtomobilčka pa navdušijo tako mlajše, kot tudi že starejše otroke. Varen in vzdržljiv. 2-stopenjska nastavitev glasnosti. Avtomobilček ima 4 kolesa, ki omogočajo z roko vodeno vožnjo, v spojlerju avtomobilčka je vključena tudi mehka odstranljiva varna silikonska guma kot grizalo, da jo lahko operete na visokih temperaturah, na podvozju avtomobilčka pa otroci najdejo 13 večfunkcijskih tipk za prvo osvajanje znanj najmlajših. Funkcija projektorja nočnega zvezdnatega neba s časovnim zamikom izklopa.

Funkcionalnosti: koordinacija roke-vid, učenje angleščine, silikonsko grizalo, pomirjujoč spanec.

Tehnične zmogljivosti: 12 tipk, 2 načina, 13 funkcij (3x otroške pesmice, 15x klavirska glasba, 15x uspavanke za miren spanec, poimenovanje 6x družinskih članov (grandpa, grandma, grandfather, grandmother, father, mother), poimenovanje 6x vozil (car, CRH, train, plane, motorcycle, bicycle), poimenovanje 6x živali (cat, dog, bear, rabbit, tiger, sheep), poimenovanje 7x barv (red, yellow, green, blue, white, light blue, purple), 5x zvoki SMS-sporočil, 4x zvoki vremena (thunder, lighting, windy, rain), 5x zvoki uporabe/zvonjenja telefona, 2x zvoki fotografiranja, 5x otroški zvoki).

Deluje na 3x AAA baterije (niso priložene).

Primerno za otroke +18 mesecev.

Garancija: 12 mesecev.

Dodatno: škatla izdelka, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Opomba: materiali so simbolični.

name: Magic 3D board with light effects (white)
shortDescription:
Conjure magic in kids everyday life. The magic board with light 3D illustrations allows the drawing to glow in different colors and light effects. Let kids create magical light through their favorite illustrations, draw new drawings again and again, adding fun and decoration to their room or more widely in your home. You can create illustrations on the magic board with the included 6 markers of different colors. With a soft cloth in case you make a mistake you can erase the artwork easily. The magic board encourages the child to create art from an early age. The light stand will make even a simple drawing made lively and magical 3D drawing effect Drawing board or frame to complement the children’s room or your home.

Runs on 3x AA batteries (not included).

Technical characteristics: voltage 4.5 V, LED/RGB light, working surface 300×200 mm, 10x different light effects, operating current 0.5 A,

Suitable for children +3 years.

Additional with the magic 3D board: drawing board, stand, 6 markers, 6 paper sketches for drawing, 1 soft wiping cloth, box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Drawing surface size: 300*220*3 mm, stand 315*50*35 mm, board + stand 315*350*35 mm

Weight: 730 g

Warranty: 6 months
shortDescription_sl:
Pričarajte čarobnost v vsakdanje življenje otrok. Magična tabla s svetlobnimi 3D ilustracijami omogoča, da narisano sveti v različnih barvah in svetlobnih učinkih. Naj otroci ustvarijo čarobno svetlobo skozi najljubše ilustracije, znova in znova narišejo nove risbice, ki dodajo zabavo in okras v njihovo sobo ali širše v vaš dom. Ilustracije na magični tabli lahko ustvarjate s priloženimi 6 flumastri različnih barv, z mehko krpo napako ali celo umetnino z lahkoto izbrišete. Magična tabla otroka že v zgodnjem otroštvu spodbuja k ustvarjanju umetnin. Stojalo z osvetlitvijo bo še tako preprosto risbo naredilo živahno in čarobno. 3D učinek risb. Tabla za risanje oz. okvir za dopolnitev otroške sobe ali vašega doma.

Deluje na 3x AA baterije (niso priložene). 

Tehnične značilnosti: napetost 4,5 V, svetloba LED/RGB, delovna površina 300×200 mm, 10x različni svetlobni učinki, delovni tok 0,5 A, 

Primerno za otroke +3 leta.

Dodatno z magično 3D tablo: risalna tabla, stojalo, 6 flumastrov, 6 papirnatih skic za risanje, 1 mehka krpa za brisanje, škatla, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Velikost risalne površine: 300*220*3 mm, stojalo 315*50*35 mm, tabla + stojalo 315*350*35 mm

Teža: 730 g

Garancija: 6 mesecev

name: LED light drawing board (white)
shortDescription:
A toy with the help of which your child develops incredible creative potentials in drawing and redrawing the most popular cartoon characters or what ever they like. The LED light drawing board, with 3 levels of illumination, allows for sophisticated and accurate redrawing of the drawing below on a new sheet of paper, with a professional grid for eye protection, A5 size, for fun and easy learning and training to draw, redraw, create amazing illustrations. Fun and relaxing for adults too. Lightweight, high quality dual LED light, safe for eyes. Requires constant power during use.

Technical characteristics: operating current: 0.35 A, rated power: 1.75 W, light source LED component, light intensity 150-220 lm.

Suitable for children +2 years (and adults).

Additional with LED light drawing board: micro USB charging cable 5V, charger, box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Size: 239*140*5 mm

Weight: 292 g

Warranty: 6 months
shortDescription_sl:
Igrača, s pomočjo katere vaš otrok razvija neverjetne potenciale ustvarjanja v risanju in prerisovanju najbolj priljubljenih junakov iz risank ali drugje. LED svetilna risalna tabla, s 3 stopnjami osvetlitve, omogoča prefinjeno in natančno prerisovanje spodnje risbe na nov list papirja, s profesionalno mrežo za zaščito oči, velikosti A5, za zabavno in enostavno učenje in treniranje risanja, prerisovanja, ustvarjanja neverjetnih ilustracij. Zabavno in sproščujoče tudi za odrasle. Lahka, visokokakovostna dvojna LED svetloba, varna za oči. Zahteva stalno napajanje med uporabo. 

Tehnične značilnosti: delovni tok: 0,35 A, nazivna moč: 1,75 W, svetlobni vir LED komponente, jakost svetlobe 150-220 lm.

Primerno za otroke +2 leti (in odrasle).

Dodatno z LED svetilno risalno tablo: mikro USB kabel za polnjenje 5V, polnilec, škatla, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Velikost: 239*140*5 mm

Teža: 292 g

Garancija: 6 mesecev

name: Audio math teacher (pink/white)
shortDescription:
Electronic cute pocket-sized children’s audio math learning aid during play, fun and excitement to learn math, which responds with sound in English to correct or incorrect math tasks. A toy in the form of a cute children’s desktop calculator. Children love to imitate adults and pick up children’s calculator for learning mathematics. With the children’s calculator, children practice learning basic mathematics (and indirectly also English) in a fun way. Say goodbye to boring learning methods and bring learning to children in a way that is interesting, fun, easy and enjoyable. The joy of learning new things and encouraging achievement from an early age.

Advantages of using an audio math teacher: mental calculation, training and developing the brain, strengthening the knowledge of numbers and mathematical knowledge, practicing logical abilities, training calculation, several teaching models of planned mathematics learning, the effect of learning mathematics is doubled, different ways of learning mathematics increase children’s learning interests, games with equations are easy to remember, digital games are interactive and interesting, indirect learning of English.

Features of using the audio math teacher: 2 million questions, setting the available time to answer the questions, listening to the calculation process, number games, real-time checking of calculations, comfortable buttons, silent operation, indirect English learning.

Number games: memorizing the sequence of numbers (15 seconds to memorize the sequence of numbers), finding the differences (listen to the question and spot the different numbers), finding the pattern (observe the pattern of numbers and find the next one).

Reading calculation aloud: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division (smartly asking and confirming questions, encouraging the child to answer questions, smartly correcting when the answer is wrong, flashing the correct answer).

Determination of available time for answering questions: free time setting (5 or 10 seconds or no time limit, difficulty gradually increases), silent training.

Suitable for children 3-9 years.

Additional with audio math teacher: USB charging cable, box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Size: 140*70*15 mm

Weight: 90 g

Warranty: 6 months
shortDescription_sl:
Elektronski ljubki žepni otroški zvočni pripomoček za učenje matematike med igro, užitek in navdušenje za učenje matematike, ki se v angleščini zvočno odziva na pravilno ali napačno opravljene matematične naloge. Igrača v obliki ljubkega otroškega namiznega kalkulatorja. Otroci radi posnemajo odrasle in v roke vzamejo otroški kalkulator za učenje matematike. Z otroškim kalkulatorjem otroci na zabaven način trenirajo učenje osnovne matematike (in posredno tudi angleščine). Poslovite se od dolgočasnih učnih metod in približajte otrokom učenje na način, da jih zanima, je zabavno, enostavno in jim je všeč. Veselje do učenja novih stvari in spodbujanje doseganja dosežkov od malih nog.  

Prednosti uporabe audio učitelja matematike: mentalno računanje, treniranja in razvijanje možganov, krepitev poznavanja številk in matematičnega znanja, vadba logičnih sposobnosti, urjenje računanja, več učnih modelov načrtovanega učenja matematike, učinek učenja matematike se podvoji, različni načini učenja matematike povečajo učne interese otrok, igre z enačbami si je enostavno zapomni, digitalne igre so interaktivne in zanimive, posredno učenje angleščine.

Zmožnosti uporabe audio učitelja matematike: 2 milijona vprašanj, nastavitev razpoložljivega časa za odgovore na vprašanja, poslušanje postopka izračuna, igre s številkami, samodejno preverjanje izračunov, udobni gumbi, tiho delovanje, posredno učenje angleščine.

Igre s številkami: pomnenje zaporedja številk (15 sekund za pomnenje zaporedja številk), iskanje razlik (poslušaj vprašanje in opazi različne številke), iskanje vzorca (opazuj vzorec številk in poišči naslednjega).

Zvočno branje izračuna: seštevanje, odštevanje, množenje, deljenje (pametno postavljanje in potrjevanje vprašanj, spodbujanje otrokovega odgovarjanja na vprašanja, pametno popravljanje, ko je odgovor napačen, utripa pravilen odgovor).

Določanje razpoložljivega časa za odgovore na vprašanja: prosta nastavitev časa (5- ali 10- sekund ali brez časovne omejitve, težavnost postopoma narašča), tiho treniranje.

Primerno za otroke 3-9 let.

Dodatno z audio učiteljem matematike: USB kabel za polnjenje, škatla, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Velikost: 140*70*15 mm

Teža: 90 g

Garancija: 6 mesecev

name: Kids digital touch screen camera with game (pink/blue)
shortDescription:
Kids touch screen digital camera and video camera with games for entertaining free time, easy to use for the youngest, large screen, with front and rear camera, light, easy to carry, quality modern design and environmentally friendly materials.

A thoughtful gift for kids, it encourages children’s intelligence, observation skills and discovery of the beauty of the world.

Digital, touch, screen 3.0 “” HD IPS LCD, diagonal 7.5 cm, 1080 P (Full-HD), 28 MP, flash, battery 800 mAh, multi-language – ANG, front and rear camera, MP4 video format, with more than 30 fun photo effects, time-lapse photography, game, 5V lithium battery, use time 2-2.5 hours, charging time 2-3 hours.

Suitable for children +3 years.

Extras with the camera: cute decorative rubber cover, mini SSD external memory card 32 GB, USB cable for charging/connecting to a computer, textile strap for the camera, silicone cord for the camera, box, instructions for use in SI/HR/EN.

Size: 103*74*50 mm

Weight: 108 g

Warranty: 1 year
name_sl: Otroški digitalni fotoaparat na dotik z igro (roza/moder)
shortDescription_sl:
Otroški digitalni fotoaparat in video kamera na dotik z igrami za zabavno preživljanje prostega časa, enostavne uporabe za najmlajše, velikega zaslona, s sprednjo in zadnjo kamero, lahek, enostaven za prenašanje, modernega dizajna in kakovostnih in okolju prijaznih materialov.

Premišljeno darilo za otroke, spodbuja otroško inteligenco, opazovalne sposobnosti in odkrivanje lepot sveta.

Digitalen, na dotik, zaslon 3,0 ” HD IPS LCD, diagonala 7,5 cm, 1080 P (Full-HD), 28 MP, bliskavica, baterija 800 mAh, več-jezičen – ANG, sprednja in zadnja kamera, MP4 video format, z več kot 30 zabavnih foto-učinkov, fotografiranje z zamikom, igra, 5V litijeva baterija, čas uporabe 2-2,5 ure, čas polnjenja 2-3 ure.

Primerno za otroke +3 leta.

Dodatno s fotoaparatom: ljubek okrasni gumijasti ovitek, mini SSD zunanja spominska kartica 32 GB, USB kabel za polnjenje/povezavo z računalnikom, tekstilni trak za fotoaparat, silikonska vrvica za fotoaparat, škatla, navodila za uporabo v SI/HR/EN.

Velikost: 103*74*50 mm

Teža: 108 g

Garancija: 1 leto

name: Baby potty
shortDescription:
Teach your child to use the toilet independently. Here you can find accessories for children in the toilet that are comfortable, durable, inconspicuous, simple and of a modern design. They go well in any bathroom or home.

The potty has a high backrest, so it is safe and comfortable. The curved backrest fits the child’s body and supports it well. The potty has a removable urine container that prevents urine from spilling and allows easy cleaning under running water. The potty is easy to carry. All materials are safe, high quality, durable, stable, reinforced plastic, BPA-free and environmentally friendly materials. There are anti-slip strips on the bottom of the potty to prevent slipping, which ensures safety for the child to use independently.

In the offer, you can also find other accessories for children to learn how to use the toilet independently in the same design.

Dimensions 310 x 350 x 250 (l x w x h), front height 180 mm, inner hole 190 x 120 x 10 mm (l x w x h).

Weight approx. 675 g

Suitable for children from 1-5 years.
shortDescription_sl:
Naučite otroka opravljati potrebo na stranišču samostojno. Pri nas najdete pripomočke za otroke na stranišču, ki so udobni, trpežni, nevpadljivi, enostavni in modernega dizajna. Lepo se podajo v vsako kopalnico oz. dom.

Otroška kahlica ima visoko naslonjalo, zato je varna in udobna. Ukrivljeno hrbtišče se prilega otrokovemu telesu in ga dobro podpira. Kahlica ima odstranljivo posodo za urin, ki preprečuje razlitje urina in omogoča enostavno čiščenje pod tekočo vodo. Kahlica je lahka za prenašanje. Vsi materiali so varni, visoko kakovostni, vzdržljivi, stabilni, iz ojačane plastike, brez BPA in iz materialov prijaznih do okolja. Na dnu kahlice so protizdrsni trakovi, ki preprečujejo zdrs, kar zagotovi varnost za samostojno uporabo otroka.

V ponudbi najdete tudi druge pripomočke za otroke za učenje samostojnega opravljanja potrebe na stranišču enakega dizajna.

Velikost: 310 x 350 x 250 (d x š x v), sprednja višina 180 mm, odprtina za potrebo 190 x 120 x 10 mm (d x š x v)

Teža: cca. 675 g

Primerna za otroke starosti 1-5 let

name: Triple set for using the toilet bowl
shortDescription:
Teach your child to use the toilet independently. Here you can find accessories for children in the toilet that are comfortable, durable, inconspicuous, simple and of a modern design. They go well in any bathroom or home.

Double step: Safe and strong: Double, child-friendly, with thick rubber bottom, non-slip, with grip on the floor.
Usability: The double footstool is great for use in toilet training, washing hands and cleaning teeth by the washbasin, helping in the kitchen, and to reach taller shelves/cupboards.
Durable and light: Two comfortable handles – easy to carry, made of reinforced plastic, with a load capacity of up to 80 kg.

Baby seat potty: adapted for children, modern and comfortable design, portable, hanging option, made of environmentally friendly material that protects the sensitive skin of the child, protection against spilling urine outside the toilet, anti-slip protection of the bottom, which prevents slipping from the toilet.

The baby potty has a high backrest, so it is safe and comfortable. The curved backrest fits the child’s body and supports it well. The potty has a removable urine container that prevents urine from spilling and allows easy cleaning under running water. The potty is easy to carry. All materials are safe, high quality, durable, stable, reinforced plastic, BPA-free and environmentally friendly materials. There are anti-slip strips on the bottom of the potty to prevent slipping, which ensures safety for the child to use independently.

Maintenance: All materials are safe, BPA-free and environmentally friendly.

Dimensions of double step: 380 x 340 x 262 (l x w x h), weight approx. 1 kg

Dimensions of baby seat potty: 350 x 280 x 55 (l x w x h), weight approx. 280 g

Dimensions of baby potty: 310 x 350 x 250 (l x w x h), front height 180 mm, inner hole 190 x 120 x 10 mm (l x w x h). weight approx. 675 g
name_sl: Trojni set za uporabo straniščne školjke
shortDescription_sl:
Naučite otroka opravljati potrebo na stranišču samostojno. Pri nas najdete pripomočke za otroke na stranišču, ki so udobni, trpežni, nevpadljivi, enostavni in modernega dizajna. Lepo se podajo v vsako kopalnico oz. dom.

Dvojna pručka: varna in čvrsta, dvojna, prilagojena za otroke, z debelim gumijastim dnom, odporna proti zdrsom, z oprijemom na tleh. Dvojna pručka je odlična za uporabo pri učenju uporabe straniščne školjke, umivanja rok in zob ob umivalniku, pomoč v kuhinji in za uporabo za dosego višjih polic/omar. Vzdržljiva in lahka, dva udobna ročaja – lahka za prenašanje, narejena iz ojačane plastike, z nosilnostjo do 80 kg. Vsi materiali so varni, brez BPA in prijazni okolju.

Nastavek za straniščno školjko: Prilagojena za otroke, moderna in udobna oblika, prenosljiva, možnost obešanja, iz okolju prijaznega materiala, ki ščiti občutljivo kožo otroka, zaščita proti polivanju urina izven straniščne školjke, protizdrsna zaščita dna, ki preprečuje zdrs iz straniščne školjke.

Otroška kahlica ima visoko naslonjalo, zato je varna in udobna. Ukrivljeno hrbtišče se prilega otrokovemu telesu in ga dobro podpira. Kahlica ima odstranljivo posodo za urin, ki preprečuje razlitje urina in omogoča enostavno čiščenje pod tekočo vodo. Kahlica je lahka za prenašanje. Vsi materiali so varni, visoko kakovostni, vzdržljivi, stabilni, iz ojačane plastike, brez BPA in iz materialov prijaznih do okolja. Na dnu kahlice so protizdrsni trakovi, ki preprečujejo zdrs, kar zagotovi varnost za samostojno uporabo otroka.

Dimezije pručke: 380 x 340 x 262 (d x š x v), teža cca. 1 kg.

Dimenzije nastavka: 350 x 280 x 55 (d x š x v), teža 280 g.

Dimenzije kahlice: 310 x 350 x 250 (d x š x v), sprednja višina 180 mm, odprtina za potrebo 190 x 120 x 10 mm (d x š x v), teža cca. 675 g.

A thoughtful gift for children, promoting children’s intelligence, observation skills and discovery of the wonders of the world.

Digital, 6.1 cm LCD screen, 1080 P, 8 MP, 4x zoom, 600mA battery, multilingual – ENG, front and rear camera, AVI video format, with more than 30 fun photo effects.

name: Audio English teacher (pink/blue)
shortDescription:
Pre-school fun playing and learning English with an audio toy in the form of a frame. By inserting various cards, the box pronounces words in English and also mimics sounds.

No need for WI-FI, safe and non-toxic, protect your eyes without screen, parent-child interaction, easy to carry.

Included: frame, USB cable, 112 different double-sided cards with 224 different words: 56x animals, 31x daily necessities, 25x vehicles, 21x foods, 18x fruits, 17x vegetables, 16x costumes, 10x nature, 9x colors, 8x persons, 8x jobs, 5x shapes.

Suitable for children from 1-8 years.

Battery: 380 mAh.
Charging: USB cable.
Charging time: 2,5 h.
Frame size: 10,7 x 9 x 2,2 cm
Package size: 18 x 10 x 5 cm
Warranty: 6 months
Weight: 320 g

Instructions for use in SLO/CRO/ENG/DE.

Predšolsko zabavno igranje in učenje angleščine z audio igračo v obliki okvirčka. Z vstavljanjem različnih kartic, okvirček izgovarja besede v angleščini ter posnema tudi zvoke.

Ni potrebe po povezavi z brezžičnim internetom, varno in brez škodljivih materialov, zaščita oči brez uporabe zaslonov, lahko vzdrževanje.

Priloženo: okvirček, USB kabel, 112 različnih obojestranskih kartic s 224 različnimi besedami: 56x živali, 31x dnevne potrebe, 25x vozila, 21x hrana, 18x sadje, 17x zelenjava, 16x kostumi, 10x narava, 9x barve, 8x osebe, 8x poklici, 5x oblike.

Primerno za otroke od 1-8 let.

Polnjenje: USB kabel.

shortDescription:
Kids karaoke microphone for entertaining free time, easy to use for the youngest, modern design and quality materials.

The microphone has a quality audio player. The microphone allows a bluetooth connection with a smartphone to play music.

The microphone can change the sound to 5 different sounds: basic, baby, adult female, adult male, warcraft. The microphone allows you to play music from your smartphone and sing at the same time. You can also connect AUX headphones to the microphone.

Instructions for use in SI/HR/EN/DE.

Mikrofon ima kakovosten predvajalnik zvoka. Mikrofon omogoča bluetooth povezavo s pametnim telefonom za predvajanje glasbe.

Mikrofon lahko spremeni zvok v 5 različnih zvokov: osnovno, dojenček, odrasla ženska, odrasli moški, bojni. Mikrofon omogoča hkratno predvajanje glasbe iz pametnega telefona in petje. V mikrofon lahko vklopite tudi AUX slušalke.

name: Kids walkie-talkie
shortDescription:
WARNING: Last pieces in stock. Only 2x blue walkie-talkies in the set are available.

A fun and attractive multifunctional children’s walkie-talkie, made specifically for the capabilities of children. With a walkie-talkie, you always know the location of the child, thus increasing his sense of security when he is not near you.

The longest distance between walkie-talkies is 3 km.

Key advantages: interactive connection of a parent with a child without the temptations of mobile phones, connection of a child with a child, communication despite a large distance, quality speakers, environmentally friendly production, environmentally friendly materials without a special smell.

Battery: 1000 mAh
Charging time: 2-3 hours.

Additionally with walkie-talkie: 2x USB charging cable on computer, 2x walkie-talkie cord, box, instructions for use in SLO/CRO/ENG/DE.

Dimensions 140*60*35, weight 78 g
Warranty: 1 year
shortDescription_sl:

Najdaljša razdalja med voki-tokijema je 3 km.

Ključne prednosti: interaktivna povezava starša z otrokom brez skušnjav mobilnih telefonov, povezava otroka z otrokom, komunikacija kljub veliki razdalji, kakovostni zvočniki, okolju prijazna proizvodnja, okolju prijazni materiali brez posebnega vonja.

name: Double set for using the toilet bowl
shortDescription:
Teach your child to use the toilet independently. Here you can find accessories for children in the toilet that are comfortable, durable, inconspicuous, simple and of a modern design. They go well in any bathroom or home.

Double step: Safe and strong: Double, child-friendly, with thick rubber bottom, non-slip, with grip on the floor.
Usability: The double footstool is great for use in toilet training, washing hands and cleaning teeth by the washbasin, helping in the kitchen, and to reach taller shelves/cupboards.
Durable and light: Two comfortable handles – easy to carry, made of reinforced plastic, with a load capacity of up to 80 kg.
Maintenance: All materials are safe, BPA-free and environmentally friendly.

Baby seat potty: adapted for children, modern and comfortable design, portable, hanging option, made of environmentally friendly material that protects the sensitive skin of the child, protection against spilling urine outside the toilet, anti-slip protection of the bottom, which prevents slipping from the toilet.

Dimensions of double step: 380 x 340 x 262 (l x w x h), weight approx. 1 kg
Dimensions of baby seat potty: 350 x 280 x 55 (l x w x h), weight approx. 280 g
name_sl: Dvojni set za uporabo straniščne školjke
shortDescription_sl:
Naučite otroka opravljati potrebo na stranišču samostojno. Pri nas najdete pripomočke za otroke na stranišču, ki so udobni, trpežni, nevpadljivi, enostavni in modernega dizajna. Lepo se podajo v vsako kopalnico oz. dom.

Dvojna pručka: varna in čvrsta, dvojna, prilagojena za otroke, z debelim gumijastim dnom, odporna proti zdrsom, z oprijemom na tleh. Dvojna pručka je odlična za uporabo pri učenju uporabe straniščne školjke, umivanja rok in zob ob umivalniku, pomoč v kuhinji in za uporabo za dosego višjih polic/omar. Vzdržljiva in lahka, dva udobna ročaja – lahka za prenašanje, narejena iz ojačane plastike, z nosilnostjo do 80 kg. Vsi materiali so varni, brez BPA in prijazni okolju.

Nastavek za straniščno školjko: Prilagojen za otroke, moderna in udobna oblika, prenosljiv, možnost obešanja, iz okolju prijaznega materiala, ki ščiti občutljivo kožo otroka, zaščita proti polivanju urina izven straniščne školjke, protizdrsna zaščita dna, ki preprečuje zdrs iz straniščne školjke.

name: Baby seat potty
shortDescription:
Teach your child to use the toilet independently. Here you can find accessories for children in the toilet that are comfortable, durable, inconspicuous, simple and of a modern design. They go well in any bathroom or home.

Baby seat potty: adapted for children, modern and comfortable design, portable, hanging option, made of environmentally friendly material that protects the sensitive skin of the child, protection against spilling urine outside the toilet, anti-slip protection of the bottom, which prevents slipping from the toilet.

In the offer, you can also find other accessories for children to learn how to use the toilet independently in the same design.

Dimensions: 350 x 280 x 55 (l x w x h)

Weight approx.: 280 g

Recommended use: 1+ year
name_sl: Nastavek za straniščno školjko za otroke
shortDescription_sl:
Naučite otroka opravljati potrebo na stranišču samostojno. Pri nas najdete pripomočke za otroke na stranišču, ki so udobni, trpežni, nevpadljivi, enostavni in modernega dizajna. Lepo se podajo v vsako kopalnico oz. dom.

Prilagojena za otroke, moderna in udobna oblika, prenosljiva, možnost obešanja, iz okolju prijaznega materiala, ki ščiti občutljivo kožo otroka, zaščita proti polivanju urina izven straniščne školjke, protizdrsna zaščita dna, ki preprečuje zdrs iz straniščne školjke.

V ponudbi najdete tudi druge pripomočke za otroke za učenje samostojnega opravljanja potrebe na stranišču enakega dizajna.

Velikost: 350 x 280 x 55 (d x š x v)
Teža: 280 g
Priporočena uporaba: 1+ leto

name: Double step
shortDescription:
Teach your child to use the toilet independently. Here you can find accessories for children in the toilet that are comfortable, durable, inconspicuous, simple and of a modern design. They go well in any bathroom or home.

Safe and strong: Double, child-friendly, with thick rubber bottom, non-slip, with grip on the floor.
Usability: The double footstool is great for use in toilet training, washing hands and cleaning teeth by the washbasin, helping in the kitchen, and to reach taller shelves/cupboards.
Durable and light: Two comfortable handles – easy to carry, made of reinforced plastic, with a load capacity of up to 80 kg.

Maintenance: All materials are safe, BPA-free and environmentally friendly.

In the offer, you can also find other accessories for children to learn how to use the toilet independently in the same design.

Dimensions: 380 x 340 x 262 (d x š x v)
Wiight approx.: cca. 1 kg
Recommended use: 1+ year
shortDescription_sl:
Naučite otroka opravljati potrebo na stranišču samostojno. Pri nas najdete pripomočke za otroke na stranišču, ki so udobni, trpežni, nevpadljivi, enostavni in modernega dizajna. Lepo se podajo v vsako kopalnico oz. dom.

Varna in čvrsta: dvojna, prilagojena za otroke, z debelim gumijastim dnom, odporna proti zdrsom, z oprijemom na tleh.

Uporabnost: dvojna pručka je odlična za uporabo pri učenju uporabe straniščne školjke, umivanja rok in zob ob umivalniku, pomoč v kuhinji in za uporabo za dosego višjih polic/omar.

Vzdržljiva in lahka: dva udobna ročaja – lahka za prenašanje, narejena iz ojačane plastike, z nosilnostjo do 80 kg.

Vzdrževanje: vsi materiali so varni, brez BPA in prijazni okolju.

V ponudbi najdete tudi druge pripomočke za otroke za učenje samostojnega opravljanja potrebe na stranišču enakega dizajna.

Velikost: 380 x 340 x 262 (d x š x v)
Teža: cca. 1 kg
Priporočena uporaba: 1+ leto

name: Ballerina shoes Star
shortDescription: Faux leather, soft, rubber sole, velcro fastening, decorated with small square mirrors, strap, with a decorative bow on the back.
shortDescription_sl: Umetno usnje, mehki, gumijast podplat, zapenjanje na ježka, dekortirani z majhnimi kvadratnimi zrcalci, na pašček, z dekorativno pentljo na zadnji strani.

name: Moccasins Unicorn
shortDescription:
Genuine leather, with fringes around, several decorative unicorn patches, comfortable tongue inserted, rubber sole sewn on the sole.

Note: The smallest size 3-6 does not have a rubber sole, as the child is not walking yet.
shortDescription_sl:
Pravo usnje, z resicami okoli, več okrasnih našitkov samoroga, vstavljen udoben jezik, na podplatu všit gumijast podplat.

Opomba: najmanjša številka 3-6 m je brez gumijastega podplata, saj otrok še ne hodi.

name: Long sleeve ruffle bolero Pearl
shortDescription: Long sleeve, O-neckline, bolero length, with beads, with multi layered lace, button fastening, decoratively gathered sleeves on the shoulders.
name_sl: Bolero jopa z dolgimi rokavi Pearl
shortDescription_sl: Dolg trokav, O izrez, bolero dolžina, s perlicami, z večslojno čipko, zapenjanje na gumb, okrasno nabrani rokavi na ramenih.

name: Decorative diaper panties Swan
shortDescription: White, with decorative tulle on the back, with elastic on the waist and on the thighs.
name_sl: Okrasne hlačke za čez pleničko Swan
shortDescription_sl: Bele, z dekorativnim tilom na zadnji strani, na elastiko v pasu in na stegnih.

name: Tights
shortDescription: Knitted, combed cotton, with elastic at the waist, two stitches over the bottom.
shortDescription_sl: Pletene, česan bombaž, z elastiko v pasu, dva šiva čez zadnjico.

name: Socks
shortDescription: Knitted, combed cotton, decorative detail around the sock on the upper leg.
shortDescription_sl: Pletene, česan bombaž, okrasni detajl okoli nogavice na zgornjem delu noge.

name: Short sleeve shirt
shortDescription: T-shirt, short sleeve, tight, O-neckline
shortDescription_sl: Majica, kratek rokav, oprijeta, O izrez.

name: Long sleeve shirt
shortDescription: T-shirt, long sleeve, tight, O-neckline.
shortDescription_sl: Majica, dolg rokav, oprijeta, O izrez.

name: Short sleeve bodysuit
shortDescription: Bodysuit with short sleeves, 2 snap buttons on the shoulders, 3 snap buttons on the lower part, tight, O-neckline.
shortDescription_sl: Bodi kratek rokav, 2 gumba na ramenih na sponke, 3 gumbi v spodnjem delu na sponke, oprijet, O izrez.

name: Long sleeve bodysuit
shortDescription: Bodysuit with long sleeves, 2 snap buttons on the shoulders, 3 snap buttons on the lower part, tight, O-neckline.
shortDescription_sl: Bodi dolg rokav, 2 gumba na ramenih na sponke, 3 gumbi v spodnjem delu na sponke, oprijet, O izrez.

name: Dress Pure
shortDescription: Sleeveless, O-neckline, many lace details, with a ribbon and bow intertwined through the lace, button fastening on the back, upper part with lining.
shortDescription_sl: Brez rokavov, O izrez, več detajlov s čipko, s trakom in pentljo prepleteno skozi čipko, zapenjanje z gumbom na hrbtu, zgornji del s podlogo,

name: Dress Sunshine
shortDescription: Sleeveless, O-neckline, elastic waist, with lining, skirt complemented by double tulle, open back, fastening on the back with 2 buttons, 2 tulle straps on the back for making a bow.
shortDescription_sl: Brez rokavov, O izrez, elastičen pas, s podlogo, krilo dopolnjeno z dvojnim tilom, odprt hrbet, zapenjanje na hrbtu z 2 gumboma, na hrbtu 2 traka iz tila za izdelavo pentlje.

name: Prom dress Lavender
shortDescription: Sleeveless, O-neckline, details of tulle and white beads on the shoulders, lining, crinoline, double tulle, fastening on the back with 5 buttons, buttons in the material of the dress, additional bow on a clip for decoration on the back, two spare buttons.
shortDescription_sl: Brez rokavov, O izrez, na ramah, detajli tila in belih perlic, podloga, krinolina, dvojni til, zapenjanje na hrbtu na 5 gumbov, gumbi oblečeni v material obleke, dodatno pentlja na sponki za dekoracijo na hrbtu, rezervno dva gumba.

name: Dress Garden
shortDescription: Short sleeve, O-neckline, lining, zip fastening on the back.
shortDescription_sl: Kratek rokav, O izrez, podloga, zapenjanje zadaj na zadrgo.

name: Dress Country
shortDescription: Straps, open back, with wide elastic waist, fastening with 2 straps, 2 fastening methods (straight, criss-cross), 3 buttons for adjusting the length of the straps on each shoulder strap, 2 holes on the dress for fastening the buttons, decorative lace in several places, multi layered skirt, two-layer shoulder straps.
shortDescription_sl: Na trakce, odprt hrbet, s širšim elastičnim pasom, zapenjanje na 2 traka, 2 načina zapenjanja (ravno, križ-kraž), na vsaki naramnici 3 gumbi za prilagajanje dolžine naramnic, 2 luknji na obleki za zapenjanje gumbov, dekorativna čipka na več mestih, večslojno krilo, dvoslojne naramnice.

name: Dress Wind
shortDescription: Straps, O-neckline, open back, with wide elastic waist, with a strap to tie on the back, with a loop on the back to connect the strap, multi layered skirt.
shortDescription_sl: Na trakce, O izrez, odprt hrbet, s širšim elastičnim pasom, s trakcem za zavezat na hrbtu, z zanko na hrbtu za povezavo trakca, večslojno krilo.
